summary: Matched two previously stubbed stage functions: grOldPupupu_80211110 in groldpupupu.c and grRCruise_80201B60 in grrcruise.c. The PR reports both as 100% matched. The changes also tightened the grRCruise_80201B60 header prototype from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void grRCruise_80201B60(HSD_JObj*, s32).
what_changed: Replaced the nonmatching marker for grOldPupupu_80211110 with a concrete implementation taking Ground_GObj*.

grOldPupupu_80211110 now obtains Ground* from gobj->user_data and HSD_JObj* from gobj->hsd_obj, calls grAnime_801C8138(gobj, gp->map_id, 0), clears Ground x10_flags.b2, applies grMaterial_801C8858(jobj, 0x28000000U), and sets gp->x11_flags.b012 to 2.
Added the gr/grmaterial.h include in groldpupupu.c to support the grMaterial_801C8858 call.
Replaced the nonmatching marker for grRCruise_80201B60 with an implementation taking HSD_JObj* and s32.
grRCruise_80201B60 now walks the DObj chain returned by HSD_JObjGetDObj(jobj), clearing flag 1 when arg1 is nonzero and setting flag 1 when arg1 is zero.
Added <sysdolphin/baselib/dobj.h> in grrcruise.c for HSD_DObj and DObj flag APIs.
Updated grrcruise.h prototype for grRCruise_80201B60 from UNK_RET grRCruise_80201B60(UNK_PARAMS) to void grRCruise_80201B60(HSD_JObj*, s32).
smart_moves: Used real HSD object types instead of leaving grRCruise_80201B60 as UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS, improving callsite and header knowledge for future work.
Kept matching-sensitive PAD_STACK calls in both functions: PAD_STACK(16) in grOldPupupu_80211110 and PAD_STACK(8) in grRCruise_80201B60.
Included the precise subsystem headers needed for newly identified calls rather than relying on implicit declarations.
Modeled grRCruise_80201B60 as DObj linked-list traversal with explicit next storage, matching the decompiled control flow shown in the diff.
Preserved the apparently redundant null check before assigning next in grRCruise_80201B60, likely because it was needed for matching even though dobj is already known non-null in the loop body.
decomp_lessons: Stage functions that manipulate Ground_GObj often need both gobj->user_data as Ground* and gobj->hsd_obj as HSD_JObj*; naming locals gp and jobj is consistent with this slice.
When a matched function reveals true argument and return types, update the header prototype immediately so later decompilation can reuse the type information.
Do not simplify away redundant-looking branches in matched code; the extra dobj != NULL check inside the while loop in grRCruise_80201B60 may be part of the required codegen.

Bitfield writes on Ground flags can be required in a specific order around animation/material calls: grOldPupupu_80211110 calls grAnime_801C8138, clears x10_flags.b2, calls grMaterial_801C8858, then sets x11_flags.b012.
For HSD_DObj visibility or render-state toggles, the common pattern is to iterate dobj->next and call HSD_DObjClearFlags or HSD_DObjSetFlags with a small unsigned mask.
naming_conventions: Ground_GObj* parameters are named gobj in implemented stage functions.
Ground* local extracted from gobj->user_data is named gp.
HSD_JObj* local extracted from gobj->hsd_obj or passed as an argument is named jobj.
HSD_DObj* traversal locals are named dobj and next.
Unknown stage function names retain address-based names such as grOldPupupu_80211110 and grRCruise_80201B60 until semantic names are known.
The second grRCruise_80201B60 argument is kept as arg1; the diff does not provide evidence for a more semantic name.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used PAD_STACK(16) in grOldPupupu_80211110 and PAD_STACK(8) in grRCruise_80201B60 to satisfy stack layout/codegen requirements.
For grRCruise_80201B60, stored dobj->next in a separate next variable before assigning back to dobj, rather than writing dobj = dobj->next directly.
Used unsigned constants 0x28000000U and 1U, preserving literal type details that can affect matching.
Kept an explicit if/else on arg1 != 0 to select HSD_DObjClearFlags versus HSD_DObjSetFlags.
Used HSD_JObjGetDObj(jobj) to seed DObj traversal instead of accessing a DObj field directly.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
The PR body states: grOldPupupu_80211110 and grRCruise_80201B60 were matched, all 100% matched.
follow_up_queries: Find callsites of grRCruise_80201B60 to determine whether arg1 can be given a semantic name.
Compare other stage functions using grMaterial_801C8858 with mask 0x28000000U for repeated material or visibility setup patterns.
Search for other HSD_DObj linked-list flag toggles using HSD_DObjClearFlags/HSD_DObjSetFlags with mask 1U.
Look for nearby Old Pupupu functions that set Ground x10_flags.b2 or x11_flags.b012 to understand the state machine semantics.
